metadata.name: liquid_events
metadata.description: Centralized CPI-only event emission for liquid programs

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA from the calling program.
Must be derived from `SEED_CPI_AUTHORITY` using an authorized program's ID.

errors.name: UnauthorizedCaller
errors.msg: Unauthorized caller: only authorized programs can emit events via CPI

types.name: AmmBuybackExecuted
docs: Event emitted when a buyback (buy-and-burn) is executed on an AMM pool.

fields.name: pool_id
docs: The pool state PDA.

fields.name: quote_amount_in
docs: Amount of quote tokens used for the buyback.

fields.name: base_amount_burned
docs: Amount of base tokens burned.

fields.name: base_mint
docs: The base token mint.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote token mint.

fields.name: executor
docs: The address that triggered the buyback.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the buyback.

types.name: AmmProtocolPaused
docs: Event emitted when the AMM protocol is paused.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin who paused the protocol.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the pause.

types.name: AmmProtocolUnpaused
docs: Event emitted when the AMM protocol is unpaused.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin who unpaused the protocol.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the unpause.

types.name: BuyAmounts
docs: Amounts for a buy trade (quote in, tokens out).

fields.name: quote_amount_in
docs: Quote amount in (SOL lamports or quote token).

fields.name: tokens_amount_out
docs: Tokens received.

types.name: CashbackEarned
docs: Event emitted when a user earns cashback credits.

fields.name: user
docs: The user earning cashback.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of cashback earned.

fields.name: new_balance
docs: New cashback balance after earning.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the earning.

types.name: CashbackModeActivated
docs: Event emitted when a user activates cashback spending mode.

fields.name: user
docs: The user activating cashback mode.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of activation.

types.name: CashbackSpent
docs: Event emitted when a user spends cashback credits.

fields.name: user
docs: The user spending cashback.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of cashback spent.

fields.name: remaining_balance
docs: Remaining cashback balance after spending.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the spending.

types.name: CurveBuybackExecuted
docs: Event emitted when a buyback is executed on a bonding curve.

fields.name: mint
docs: The token mint.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint. None for native SOL curves.

fields.name: bonding_curve
docs: The bonding curve PDA.

fields.name: executor
docs: The address that triggered the buyback.

fields.name: quote_amount_in
docs: Amount of quote tokens/SOL used for the buyback.

fields.name: tokens_burned
docs: Amount of tokens burned.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the buyback.

types.name: CurveCompleted
docs: Event emitted when a bonding curve is marked as complete (ready for migration).

fields.name: mint
docs: The token mint.

fields.name: bonding_curve
docs: The bonding curve PDA.

fields.name: market_cap_usd
docs: Market cap in USD at completion (6 decimals).

fields.name: sol_price_usd
docs: SOL price in USD at completion (6 decimals).

fields.name: virtual_token_reserves
docs: Virtual token reserves at completion.

fields.name: virtual_quote_reserves
docs: Virtual quote reserves (SOL) at completion.

fields.name: real_token_reserves
docs: Real token reserves at completion.

fields.name: real_quote_reserves
docs: Real quote reserves (SOL) at completion.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of completion.

types.name: CurveProtocolPaused
docs: Event emitted when the bonding curve protocol is paused.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin who paused the protocol.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the pause.

types.name: CurveProtocolUnpaused
docs: Event emitted when the bonding curve protocol is unpaused.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin who unpaused the protocol.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the unpause.

types.name: DealClosed
docs: Event emitted when a cashback deal is closed.

fields.name: owner
docs: The deal owner.

fields.name: redemption_count
docs: Number of times the deal was redeemed.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of closure.

types.name: DealCreated
docs: Event emitted when a cashback deal is created.

fields.name: owner
docs: The deal owner.

fields.name: cashback_multiplier_bps
docs: Cashback multiplier in basis points.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of creation.

types.name: DealRedeemed
docs: Event emitted when a user redeems a cashback deal.

fields.name: user
docs: The user redeeming the deal.

fields.name: deal_owner
docs: The deal owner.

fields.name: cashback_multiplier_bps
docs: Cashback multiplier in basis points.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of redemption.

types.name: DealUpdated
docs: Event emitted when a cashback deal is updated.

fields.name: owner
docs: The deal owner.

fields.name: old_multiplier_bps
docs: Previous multiplier in basis points.

fields.name: new_multiplier_bps
docs: New multiplier in basis points.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of update.

types.name: FeeConfigAuthorityOverridden
docs: Event emitted when a fee configuration's update authority is overridden by admin.

fields.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration PDA.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint this configuration applies to.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin who performed the override.

fields.name: old_authority
docs: The previous update authority.

fields.name: new_authority
docs: The new update authority.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the override.

types.name: FeeConfigRevoked
docs: Event emitted when a fee configuration is permanently revoked.

fields.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration PDA.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint this configuration applies to.

fields.name: revoker
docs: The authority who revoked the configuration.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the revocation.

types.name: FeeConfigUpdateEventRecipient
docs: Fee recipient for event emission. Mirrors `liquid_fees::FeeRecipient` without bytemuck deps.

fields.name: pubkey
docs: Recipient public key.

fields.name: basis_points
docs: Share in basis points (sum must equal 10000).

types.name: FeeConfigUpdated
docs: Event emitted when a fee configuration is updated.

fields.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration PDA.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint this configuration applies to.

fields.name: authority
docs: The authority who performed the update.

fields.name: recipients
docs: Fee recipients after the update.

fields.name: new_update_authority
docs: The update authority after the update.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the update.

types.name: FeeMode
docs: Fee mode for event emission. Mirrors `liquid_fees::FeeMode` without bytemuck deps.

types.name: FeesClaimed
docs: Event emitted when a recipient claims accumulated fees from their vault.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint of the claimed tokens. `Pubkey::default()` for native SOL.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount claimed.

fields.name: recipient
docs: The recipient who claimed.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the claim.

types.name: FeesDistributed
docs: Event emitted when accumulated fees are distributed to recipients.

fields.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration PDA.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint of the distributed tokens. `Pubkey::default()` for native SOL.

fields.name: total_amount
docs: Total amount distributed across all recipients.

fields.name: recipients_count
docs: Number of recipients that received fees.

fields.name: distributor
docs: The address that triggered the distribution.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the distribution.

types.name: LpChangeEvent
docs: Event emitted on LP deposit or withdraw.

fields.name: pool_id
docs: The pool state PDA.

fields.name: base_mint
docs: The base token mint.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote token mint.

fields.name: user
docs: The user who performed the deposit/withdraw.

fields.name: change_type
docs: 0: deposit, 1: withdraw.

fields.name: base_amount
docs: Base amount deposited/withdrawn.

fields.name: quote_amount
docs: Quote amount deposited/withdrawn.

fields.name: base_vault_before
docs: Pool base vault balance before change.

fields.name: quote_vault_before
docs: Pool quote vault balance before change.

fields.name: lp_amount_before
docs: LP balance before change.

fields.name: base_transfer_fee
docs: Transfer fee on base token.

fields.name: quote_transfer_fee
docs: Transfer fee on quote token.

fields.name: lp_supply
docs: Total LP supply after the change.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the LP change.

types.name: MigrationCompleted
docs: Event emitted after a successful migration from bonding curve to AMM.

fields.name: mint
docs: The token mint that was migrated.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint. None for native SOL migrations (WSOL used in AMM).

fields.name: bonding_curve
docs: The bonding curve that was migrated.

fields.name: amm_pool
docs: The AMM pool state address.

fields.name: migrator
docs: The address that triggered the migration.

fields.name: creator
docs: The creator of the original bonding curve.

fields.name: token_amount
docs: Amount of tokens migrated to AMM.

fields.name: quote_amount
docs: Amount of quote migrated to AMM (SOL or quote token).

fields.name: lp_mint
docs: The LP mint address created during migration.

fields.name: lp_tokens_minted
docs: Total LP tokens minted.

fields.name: buyback_amount_migrated
docs: Amount of buyback funds migrated to the AMM buyback vault (0 if none).

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the migration.

types.name: PoolCreated
docs: Event emitted when a new AMM pool is created.

fields.name: pool_id
docs: The pool state PDA.

fields.name: base_mint
docs: The base token mint.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote token mint.

fields.name: creator
docs: The creator of the pool.

fields.name: initial_base_amount
docs: Initial base token amount deposited.

fields.name: initial_quote_amount
docs: Initial quote token amount deposited.

fields.name: lp_tokens_minted
docs: LP tokens minted.

fields.name: lp_mint
docs: The LP mint address.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of pool creation.

types.name: ReferralRewardsWithdrawn
docs: Event emitted when referral rewards are withdrawn.

fields.name: user
docs: The user who withdrew rewards.

fields.name: mint
docs: Mint of the withdrawn token. None for native SOL.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount withdrawn.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the withdrawal.

types.name: ReferrerSet
docs: Event emitted when a user sets their referrer.

fields.name: user
docs: The user setting the referrer.

fields.name: referrer
docs: The referrer address.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the referral.

types.name: SellAmounts
docs: Amounts for a sell trade (tokens in, quote out).

fields.name: tokens_amount_in
docs: Tokens sold.

fields.name: quote_amount_out
docs: Quote amount out (SOL lamports or quote token).

types.name: SnapshotTaken
docs: Event emitted when a user volume snapshot is taken.

fields.name: user
docs: The user whose snapshot was taken.

fields.name: index
docs: Snapshot index.

fields.name: usd_volume
docs: USD volume at snapshot time.

fields.name: token_volume
docs: Token volume at snapshot time.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of snapshot.

types.name: SwapEvent
docs: Event emitted on an AMM swap.

fields.name: pool_id
docs: The pool state PDA.

fields.name: base_mint
docs: The base (token) mint.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote mint.

fields.name: user
docs: User who performed the swap.

fields.name: creator
docs: Creator of the token.

fields.name: trade_amounts
docs: Trade in and out amounts.

fields.name: base_vault_before
docs: Pool base vault balance before trade.

fields.name: quote_vault_before
docs: Pool quote vault balance before trade.

fields.name: base_transfer_fee
docs: Transfer fee on base token.

fields.name: quote_transfer_fee
docs: Transfer fee on quote token.

fields.name: lp_fee
docs: LP fee amount.

fields.name: creator_fee
docs: Creator fee amount.

fields.name: protocol_fee
docs: Protocol fee amount (after cashback deduction).

fields.name: lp_fee_bps
docs: LP fee basis points.

fields.name: creator_fee_bps
docs: Creator fee basis points.

fields.name: protocol_fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee basis points.

fields.name: creator_fee_mode
docs: Creator fee routing mode.

fields.name: fee_recipient
docs: Fee recipient.

fields.name: cashback
docs: Cashback earned (positive) or spent (negative) by the user.

fields.name: cashback_bps
docs: Cashback basis points from config.

fields.name: total_quote_volume
docs: Cumulative quote volume after the trade.

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Cumulative token volume after the trade.

fields.name: buyback_vault_balance
docs: Buyback vault balance after the trade (quote token amount).

fields.name: sol_price_usd
docs: SOL/USD price at trade time (6 decimals).

fields.name: market_cap_usd
docs: Current market cap in USD (6 decimals).

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the trade.

types.name: TokenCreated
docs: Event emitted after a successful token creation on a bonding curve.

fields.name: name
docs: Name of the token.

fields.name: symbol
docs: Symbol of the token.

fields.name: uri
docs: URI of the token metadata.

fields.name: mint
docs: Mint address of the new token.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint for the curve. None for native SOL curves.

fields.name: bonding_curve
docs: Bonding curve PDA address.

fields.name: creator
docs: Creator of the token.

fields.name: creator_referrer
docs: Creator's referrer address (earns creator_referral_fee). None if no referrer.

fields.name: initial_virtual_reserves
docs: Initial virtual reserves in USD (6 decimals).

fields.name: initial_virtual_token_reserves
docs: Initial virtual token reserves.

fields.name: initial_real_token_reserves
docs: Initial real token reserves.

fields.name: total_token_supply
docs: Total token supply.

fields.name: token_program
docs: Token program ID.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of creation.

types.name: TradeAmounts
docs: Trade amount variants for bonding curve and AMM trades.

types.name: TradeEvent
docs: Event emitted after a successful bonding curve trade.

fields.name: mint
docs: Mint of the token traded.

fields.name: bonding_curve
docs: The bonding curve PDA address.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint. None for native SOL trades.

fields.name: user
docs: User who performed the trade.

fields.name: creator
docs: Creator of the token.

fields.name: trade_amounts
docs: Trade in and out amounts.

fields.name: creator_fee
docs: Creator fee paid.

fields.name: creator_fee_bps
docs: Creator fee basis points.

fields.name: protocol_fee
docs: Protocol fee paid.

fields.name: protocol_fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee basis points.

fields.name: creator_fee_mode
docs: Creator fee mode.

fields.name: fee_recipient
docs: Fee recipient.

fields.name: creator_referral_fee
docs: Creator referral fee paid.

fields.name: creator_referral_fee_bps
docs: Creator referral fee basis points.

fields.name: trader_referral_fee
docs: Trader referral fee paid.

fields.name: trader_referral_fee_bps
docs: Trader referral fee basis points.

fields.name: creator_referrer
docs: Creator's referrer address (earns creator_referral_fee). None if no referrer.

fields.name: trader_referrer
docs: Trader's referrer address (earns trader_referral_fee). None if no referrer.

fields.name: cashback
docs: Cashback earned (positive) or spent (negative) by the user.

fields.name: cashback_bps
docs: Cashback fee basis points.

fields.name: virtual_token_reserves
docs: Virtual token reserves after the trade.

fields.name: virtual_quote_reserves
docs: Virtual quote reserves after the trade (SOL lamports or quote token amount).

fields.name: real_token_reserves
docs: Real token reserves after the trade.

fields.name: real_quote_reserves
docs: Real quote reserves after the trade (SOL lamports or quote token amount).

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume (6 decimals).

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Token volume after the trade.

fields.name: buyback_vault_balance
docs: Buyback vault balance after the trade (lamports for native, token amount for stable).

fields.name: sol_price_usd
docs: SOL/USD price at trade time (6 decimals). None for stable curves.

fields.name: market_cap_usd
docs: Current market cap in USD (6 decimals).

fields.name: is_curve_complete
docs: Whether the curve is complete (ready for migration) after this trade.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of the trade.

types.name: UserUpdatedByAdmin
docs: Event emitted when an admin updates a user's state.

fields.name: user
docs: The user whose state was updated.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin who performed the update.

fields.name: snapshot_index
docs: The snapshot index after update.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp of update.
